app.name: Nikah Connect
app.description: A marriage app built on Islamic values

demo.title: Nikah Connect Demo: Messaging and Video Chat
demo.description: This page demonstrates the messaging and video chat capabilities of Nikah Connect using dummy profiles. You can select different conversations, send messages, and simulate video calls.
messagingTips: Click on a profile to start a conversation
Send messages with the chat input at the bottom
Test message encryption and retention policies
videoTips: Try video calling using the video call button
Experiment with different privacy and security settings
Experience Wali supervision for appropriate conversations

demoSection.title: Discover Our Platform
demoSection.subtitle: Explore all our features with interactive demo profiles. Test messaging, video calls and discover how we respect Islamic values.
